CaptureRequest.description: Optional body for capture — omit amount to capture the full authorized amount

amount.description: Amount to capture (optional, defaults to full amount)

CaptureRequest.title: CaptureRequest

interval_days.description: Interval in days (required for custom type)

CustomerInfo.description: Customer information embedded in a payment request
CustomerInfo.title: CustomerInfo

externalRef.description: Caller's natural idempotency key within the source. Unique per (source, externalRef).

feeAmount.description: Caller-computed platform fee (Decimal-as-string). Optional. UPG performs NO fee computation.

grossAmount.description: Gross amount collected, encoded as a JSON string to preserve Decimal precision (e.g. "10.00").

metadata.description: Arbitrary JSON-coercible metadata, opaque to UPG.

netAmount.description: Caller-computed net payable to the payee (Decimal-as-string). Optional.

payeeRef.description: Opaque identifier of the party to be settled. UPG never interprets it.

source.description: Opaque settlement-channel namespace owned by the caller (e.g. "partner.cod"). UPG never interprets it.

info.description: Unified API for multiple payment gateways (MyFatoorah, Stripe, etc.)
info.title: Unified Payment Gateway API

post.description: Product-agnostic settlement primitive. Idempotent on `(source, externalRef)`: replays return 200 with the existing record; conflicting replays (same key, different gross/fee/net) return 409. UPG performs NO fee/commission computation — callers pass pre-computed amounts. Legacy COD aliases (`/payments/cod/*`) are retained as deprecated forwarders to this endpoint.
post.summary: Record a generic external settlement intent

parameters.description: Caller idempotency key within the source
parameters.name: external_ref

get.summary: Get an external settlement by (source, external_ref)
